title: CCLL2 compared with wartime media and social-network lexicons

publication.scope: Every row from the reviewed CCLL2, wartime media, and social-network comparison file.
publication.access: Static JSON chunks. A null metric means the word is absent from that source, not that its count is zero.

provenance.citation: Utka, A. 2024. Comparative wordlist based on CCLL2 and wartime media and social-network lexicons.

constraints: Preserve null for an absent source metric; do not coerce it to zero.
Show normalized units and source denominators beside every metric.
Keep token and document metrics distinct.
Do not rank or export the six metrics as one total-frequency column.

views.title: CCLL2, wartime media, and social-network metrics
views.description: Token and document counts normalized by the source to 100 million source words. Metrics remain separate and nullable.
